text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is in poor shape, and<n>she drags her
feet as she exits the<n>waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Once the gates open, there's nothing<n>more I can
do to help her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is pray that Narita Taishin<n>returns in
one piece.
